setupNotes: Import app CSS: use northstar-ui/theme.css (or northstar-ui/styles.css) plus @source for northstar-ui/dist/**/*.js in your Tailwind v4 entry (see README).
Use DirectionProvider from northstar-ui/primitives for RTL/LTR (see docs/rtl.md).
Prefer primitives and composites over importing src/components/ui directly; wrappers are the stable API.

primitives.title: Alert Dialog
primitives.importExample: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Modal confirmation pattern built on Radix Alert Dialog; use for destructive or irreversible actions.
whenToUse: Confirm deletes, payment, or navigation away from dirty state.
Prefer over Dialog when the flow must block until the user chooses.
primitives.composition: Wrap trigger content in AlertDialogTrigger; place layout in AlertDialogContent; wire primary action to AlertDialogAction and dismiss to AlertDialogCancel.

primitives.title: Avatar
primitives.summary: User or entity image with fallback initials and optional badge/group affordances.
whenToUse: Represent users in lists, headers, comments, and menus.
primitives.composition: Provide AvatarImage with src/alt; use AvatarFallback for initials or icon when the image fails.

primitives.title: Badge
primitives.summary: Small status or label chip with variants for emphasis.
whenToUse: Counts, status (beta, new), tags on list rows, inline metadata.
primitives.composition: Use badgeVariants for class-only reuse; Badge wraps children text or icons.

primitives.title: Button
primitives.summary: Primary clickable control; wraps shadcn Button with Northstar destructive/link contrast tweaks and pointer cursor.
whenToUse: Form submit, dialogs, toolbars, list row actions.
primitives.composition: Pass variant and size per design system; combine with icons from lucide-react as children.

primitives.title: Card
primitives.importExample: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Grouped surface for dashboard tiles, settings sections, and preview panels.
whenToUse: Cluster related content with a clear title and optional footer actions.
primitives.composition: CardHeader + CardTitle (+ CardDescription); optional CardAction; body in CardContent; CardFooter for buttons.

primitives.title: Checkbox
primitives.summary: Binary toggle with Radix checkbox semantics and keyboard support.
whenToUse: Multi-select lists, settings toggles that are not instant actions (use Switch for on/off settings when appropriate).
primitives.composition: Pair with Label; use in controlled mode with checked/onCheckedChange.

primitives.title: Dialog
primitives.importExample: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: General-purpose modal for forms, detail views, and workflows that are not strictly confirmations.
whenToUse: Rich modal content, multi-field forms, secondary flows.
primitives.composition: DialogTrigger opens; DialogContent contains header/body/footer subcomponents.

primitives.title: Direction (RTL/LTR)
primitives.summary: Sets document/dir context for logical CSS and Radix behavior across the tree.
whenToUse: Any app that must support RTL scripts or user-driven direction switching.
primitives.composition: Wrap the app shell; also set html lang/dir in the host app (see docs/rtl.md).

primitives.title: Dropdown Menu
primitives.importExample: import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Contextual command menu for actions, toggles, and nested submenus.
whenToUse: Row actions, kebab menus, compact command surfaces.
primitives.composition: Trigger wraps the activator; place items inside Content; use Separator and Label for structure.

primitives.title: Form (react-hook-form)
primitives.importExample: import { Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Integrates react-hook-form with accessible field layout and validation messaging.
whenToUse: Complex forms with schema validation and error display.
primitives.composition: Form wraps RHF FormProvider; FormField renders per-field controllers with FormItem structure.

primitives.title: Input
primitives.summary: Single-line text field styled for the Northstar theme.
whenToUse: Short text, search fields, compact inline edits.
primitives.composition: Pair with Label; set type for email/password/url as needed.

primitives.title: Input OTP
primitives.summary: One-time code entry with grouped slots for verification flows.
whenToUse: MFA, email/SMS codes, invite redemption codes.
primitives.composition: Render slots inside InputOTPGroup; control value/onChange at InputOTP root.

primitives.title: Label
primitives.summary: Accessible label primitive aligned with Radix Label.
whenToUse: Associate text with Input, Checkbox, Switch, or custom controls.
primitives.composition: Use htmlFor matching control id or wrap the control.

primitives.title: Progress
primitives.summary: Determinate or indeterminate progress indicator.
whenToUse: Uploads, multi-step flows, loading bars with known progress.
primitives.composition: Pass value 0-100 for determinate mode.

primitives.title: Select
primitives.importExample: import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Styled select menu for choosing one option from a list.
whenToUse: When space is limited and native select styling is insufficient.
primitives.composition: SelectTrigger shows SelectValue; list options as SelectItem inside SelectContent.

primitives.title: Separator
primitives.summary: Visual divider for horizontal or vertical layout regions.
whenToUse: Split toolbars, menus, and stacked sections.
primitives.composition: Set orientation prop; use decorative role where appropriate.

primitives.title: Sheet
primitives.importExample: import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Slide-in panel (drawer) from screen edges for secondary navigation or filters.
whenToUse: Mobile-first navigation, filter panels, auxiliary detail.
primitives.composition: SheetTrigger opens; SheetContent holds header/footer and body.

primitives.title: Sidebar
primitives.importExample: import { SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarInset, SidebarTrigger, SidebarContent, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Application sidebar shell with collapsible behavior and keyboard-friendly menu structure.
whenToUse: App chrome navigation, nested menus, collapsible rail layouts.
primitives.composition: Wrap with SidebarProvider; place navigation inside Sidebar; main content in SidebarInset.

primitives.title: Skeleton
primitives.summary: Placeholder shimmer for loading states.
whenToUse: List row placeholders, card loading, text block placeholders.
primitives.composition: Tune height/width with className; nest for composite skeletons.

primitives.title: Switch
primitives.summary: Binary on/off control optimized for immediate settings changes.
whenToUse: Feature toggles, dark mode switches (with appropriate labeling).
primitives.composition: Always pair with Label; use checked/onCheckedChange for controlled state.

primitives.title: Table
primitives.importExample: import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Semantic HTML table primitives with themed borders and spacing.
whenToUse: Tabular data, admin lists, comparison matrices.
primitives.composition: Use TableHeader/Body/Footer; scope headers with TableHead.

primitives.title: Tabs
primitives.importExample: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Tabbed interface for switching related views without navigation.
whenToUse: Settings sections, dashboards with sibling views.
primitives.composition: TabsList contains TabsTrigger elements; TabsContent matches value props.

primitives.title: Textarea
primitives.summary: Multi-line text input for descriptions, comments, and long-form fields.
whenToUse: Notes, message composition, JSON editors (with appropriate validation).
primitives.composition: Pair with Label; control value/onChange for controlled usage.

primitives.title: Toast (Sonner)
primitives.summary: Global toast notifications via Sonner; mount Toaster once at app root.
whenToUse: Transient success/error/info messages after actions.
primitives.composition: Render Toaster in the shell; call toast() from event handlers.

primitives.title: Toggle
primitives.summary: Two-state button for toolbar modes (bold/italic) or view toggles.
whenToUse: Icon-only stateful controls where Switch is not the right metaphor.
primitives.composition: Use pressed/onPressedChange; style via toggleVariants when needed.

primitives.title: Tooltip
primitives.importExample: import { TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from "northstar-ui/primitives"
primitives.summary: Hover/focus tooltips for supplementary information.
whenToUse: Icon-only buttons, truncated labels, shortcut hints.
primitives.composition: Wrap subtree with TooltipProvider once; TooltipTrigger wraps the anchor; TooltipContent holds text.

composites.title: LoginCard
composites.summary: Opinionated email/password sign-in form using Northstar Input and Button.
whenToUse: Auth demos, internal tools, quick login scaffolding.
composites.composition: Pass onSubmit to receive { email, password }; customize labels via props.

composites.title: AppSidebar
composites.summary: Simple vertical nav list with active item styling using Button variants.
whenToUse: Marketing or app side navigation prototypes; not the full Sidebar primitive shell.
composites.composition: Provide items with id/label; control activeId and onSelect for routing integration.

tokens.summary: Semantic scales and CSS variable maps for theming; themeCssVars is generated from CSS (pnpm generate:tokens).

exports.name: semanticTokens
exports.notes: Manual space/radius composition atop generated theme maps.

exports.name: themeCssVars
exports.notes: Generated palette tokens from theme.css + overrides.css.

exports.name: toCssCustomProperties
exports.notes: Serialize token objects to inline style-ready CSS variables.
